  • Uses of RankingEntry in com.arcade.service

    Methods in com.arcade.service that return types with arguments of type RankingEntry
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    List<RankingEntry>
    RankingService.getRanking()
    Returns all stored ranking entries.
    List<RankingEntry>
    RankingService.getTopScores(int limit)
    Returns the top ranking entries ordered by score in descending order.
    List<RankingEntry>
    RankingService.loadRanking()
    Loads ranking entries from the JSON file.
    Method parameters in com.arcade.service with type arguments of type RankingEntry
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    RankingService.saveRanking(List<RankingEntry> ranking)
    Saves the provided ranking entries into the JSON file.
